query: Current fill percentage/storage of Lázaro Cárdenas (El Palmito) dam in Durango Mexico from Conagua SINA, latest daily readings for July 2026 and late June 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. The most recent confirmed SINA/Conagua reading for the Lázaro Cárdenas (El Palmito) dam is **21% of capacity as of July 8, 2026**, on a declining trajectory. Full findings, trajectory, and sources are in the report and structured output above.

Key highlights:
- **July 8, 2026**: 21% (~621 Mm³ of 2,957.61 Mm³ total), inflows only 44 m³/s, releasing 109 m³/s to Las Tórtolas
- **June 20, 2026**: ~765 Mm³, declining trend
- **Driver**: 750 Mm³ extraction for 2026 agricultural cycle + insufficient upper-Nazas rainfall
- **Context**: Above the 2025 seasonal low (17.1% on July 3, 2025) but concern building for the 2027 cycle

Note: The live SINA portal is a JavaScript app that couldn't be scraped directly, so the daily figures come from journalist citations of Conagua's daily bulletins, and no reading later than July 8 was published in accessible sources.

sources.title: Presa El Palmito cae al 21% de su capacidad; mínimas aportaciones agravan crisis hídrica
sources.snippet: El Palmito at 21% of capacity as of July 8, 2026; inflows 44 m³/s, releases 109 m³/s to Las Tórtolas; concern for 2027 agricultural cycle.

sources.title: Presa El Palmito acumula apenas 765 millones de m3
sources.snippet: As of June 20, 2026, El Palmito held ~765 Mm³ with a declining trend; Pacific systems had not produced significant inflows.

sources.title: Presa Lázaro Cárdenas: nivel de llenado en la recta final de la temporada de lluvias
sources.snippet: Total capacity 2,957.61 Mm³; 42.2% (1,248.938 Mm³) as of Sept 30, 2025; recovered from 18.1% on June 24, 2025.

sources.title: Entregan 188 millones de metros cúbicos de agua, cierran compuertas de la presa Lázaro Cárdenas
sources.snippet: First 188 Mm³ of the 750 Mm³ 2026 cycle allocation delivered; gates closed ~April 13, 2026.

sources.title: Preocupan bajos niveles de la presa El Palmito, está al 17%
sources.snippet: El Palmito at 17.1% of capacity per Conagua bulletin of July 3, 2025.

sources.title: SINA - Monitoreo de Presas (Conagua)
sources.snippet: Official Conagua daily dam monitoring portal; JavaScript app, not directly scrapeable.
